name: Apple Crunch Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 package Regular butterscotch pudding mix, 4 oz pkg.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix oats, cereal, flour, sugar, soda, and spices in a bowl until combined.
2. Add butter or margarine to the mixture and cut in using your fingers until crumbly.
3. Press half of the mixture into an 8x8x2 inch baking dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
5. Prepare the butterscotch pudding mix according to package directions, using 1 1/2 cups milk.
6. Pour the prepared pudding over the crumb layer in the baking dish.
7. Mix the remaining ingredients (apple pie filling, lemon peel, and lemon juice) in a separate bowl.
8. Spoon the mixture over the pudding layer.
9. Top with the remaining crumbs.
10. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
11. Serve warm or cool with ice cream, if desired.
